visual_features.overall_style: Clean, modern, and corporate with a minimalist layout. Strong high-contrast black-and-white hero section combined with a vivid brand red for emphasis. The design feels conference/event oriented: bold typography, straightforward structure, and limited decorative elements.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven primarily by contrast, scale, and color. The black hero band with large white uppercase title text dominates the page. Within the hero, the event title and subtitle on the left are the first focal point, followed by the white-outlined duration box on the right. In the header, the red logo and red CTA button stand out against a white background and light gray top bar, drawing attention to the brand and the main action ('Iscriviti'). Navigation links are smaller, medium-gray text, forming a secondary level in the hierarchy.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Generous horizontal padding in the header and hero with wide margins around the main title, creating a spacious, uncluttered feel. Vertical spacing between the header and hero is moderate, while the hero itself uses ample top and bottom padding. Elements are not crowded; there is clear separation between the text block and the 60-minutes box. Overall whitespace is used to create focus on a few key elements rather than dense content.
unique_elements: Large full-width black hero section with a two-column composition (text + time box) for the featured session.
Outlined square duration card ('60 Minutes') on black background, relying purely on stroke and typography for emphasis.
Pill-shaped red CTA button in the navigation bar that visually dominates the otherwise flat textual nav.
Floating circular chat/help button in the lower-left corner with cyan border and dots, providing a persistent secondary action.
Thin top information strip naming the region (Regione Emilia-Romagna) above the primary header, giving a hierarchical institutional context.

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column desktop grid with a centered maximum-width container. Hero content appears to use a two-column split (roughly 7/12 for text on the left and 5/12 for the duration card on the right) within this grid.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Centered fixed-width content within full-width background sections. Top horizontal navigation, followed by a full-width hero band. Primary pattern is a linear top-to-bottom flow with section-based bands.
layout_characteristics.section_organization: From top to bottom: (1) Slim neutral top bar with regional label. (2) Main header with logo on the left, horizontal navigation in the center/right, and a standout red CTA button plus language switch to the far right. (3) Full-width hero section with a solid black background, left-aligned large event title/subtitle, and a right-aligned timer card. (Other conference content likely follows below in similar full-width bands.)
layout_characteristics.alignment: Logo and hero content are left-aligned within a centered content container. Navigation items are horizontally aligned and likely left-justified relative to the logo, with the CTA and language selector right-aligned. In the hero, text is left-aligned; the duration card is right-aligned with equal top and bottom vertical alignment, forming a balanced horizontal composition.
responsive_hints: Centered fixed-width container suggests responsive breakpoints where padding/margins adjust for smaller screens.
Two-column hero (text + timer card) likely stacks vertically on mobile, with the text appearing above the duration card.
Horizontal navigation would likely collapse into a hamburger menu or off-canvas drawer on small viewports.
Floating chat/help button is positioned using fixed positioning and would remain in the corner across breakpoints.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow: top institutional bar, then main header, then a full-width hero. Inside the hero, a two-column arrangement: a large block of vertical text on the left (one or two stacked headings) and a single centered box on the right showing session duration. The hero is treated as a single focal section, with no secondary columns beneath what is visible; additional sections would continue this vertical stacking further down the page.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: The top information bar is short (around 5–8% of viewport height) with minimal padding. The main header consumes approximately 10–15% of the vertical space with ample horizontal padding. The hero dominates the remainder of the visible viewport, using a large central block of whitespace around the text and the duration card. Within the hero, the left text block occupies around 60–65% of the width, with the right duration card taking 25–30%, leaving gaps between them and the container edges for breathing room. The floating chat button occupies minimal space at the bottom-left corner, overlaying the layout.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Spacious layout with low content density. Large typography, generous padding, and very few elements result in high readability and clear focus. The hero contains only essential information (title, subtitle, duration), avoiding clutter. The header is concise, with clear separation between items.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: The eye starts at the top-left with 'Regione Emilia-Romagna', then quickly moves to the more prominent logo in the header. From there, it scans horizontally across the navigation links and rests on the bright red CTA button on the right. Upon moving down, the stark black hero background pulls attention to the large white event title, leading the eye down the multi-line subtitle, then across to the right where it lands on the outlined 60-minutes box. The floating chat button at the very bottom-left provides a subtle secondary focal point once the primary hero has been processed.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Prominent CTA button in the header: pill-shaped with fully rounded corners (border-radius around 24–28px), horizontal padding roughly 20–28px, and medium height (around 40–44px). Solid vivid red background (#F03A32) with white uppercase or title-case text. No visible border; separation is achieved via color contrast. Flat design with no heavy shadows, possibly a subtle inner or outer shadow for depth, but overall very minimal. Secondary buttons (not shown here but implied) would likely use an outlined or ghost style leveraging the same red or white on dark backgrounds.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typically implemented as a

ui_patterns.visual_description: The 60-minutes duration element behaves like a simple card: a perfect or near-perfect square on black background, defined solely by a 1–2px white border. No fill color beyond the section’s black, and no shadow, giving it a flat, minimalist look. Internal content is centered both horizontally and vertically, with the large numeric value ('60') in bold white text and smaller descriptor text ('Minutes') under it in lighter weight and slightly reduced font size. Corners appear to be sharp (border-radius 0–2px). Internal padding is moderate, creating comfortable distance from the text to the border.

ui_patterns.visual_description: No explicit form elements are visible in the provided frame, but consistent with this style, form fields would likely be clean and rectangular with 2–4px border-radius, thin gray borders (#C5C5C5) or bottom-only borders on white backgrounds. Labels would be above the inputs, with clear spacing and a regular-weight sans-serif font. Focus states would likely change border color to red (#F03A32) or black, possibly with a subtle glow or thickness increase. Error states would probably use red borders and small red helper text under the field. Overall density medium, with full-width fields and vertical stacking.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typical stacked layout: <form> with each field wrapped in a <div class='form-group'> containing a <label> (block-level, above) and an <input> or <textarea>. Additional helper/error messages as <small> or <span> beneath inputs. Flexbox or grid may be used for multi-column arrangements at larger breakpoints.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Primary navigation is a horizontal text menu placed to the right of the logo on a white background. Items are set in a medium-gray or nearly black sans-serif, all in sentence case. Each menu item has generous horizontal spacing (around 24–32px between labels). The active or emphasized action is presented as a bright red pill-shaped button rather than a standard text link. Links are likely underlined or change color on hover. Language selection appears as a small flag icon followed by red text ('Italiano') on the far right. The overall style is flat and minimalist, relying on spacing and color for clarity.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Direct list patterns are not visible in this frame, but based on the general style, lists of sessions or events would likely be presented as either simple vertical lists of text (title + meta) with ample spacing and subtle separators, or as simple cards with light borders and limited shadows. Items would have clear typographic hierarchy (bold title, smaller gray metadata). Separators might be 1px lines with a light gray color (#E0E0E0) or spacing-based separation without lines.

heading.visual_style: Headings appear as a modern, condensed grotesque sans-serif with tall uppercase letters, relatively narrow width, and clean, uniform strokes. High legibility, minimal decorative features, and tight tracking for large titles.

body.visual_style: Body text is a clean, neutral sans-serif with good readability and moderate x-height, suitable for both navigation labels and longer descriptions. It looks like a straightforward humanist/grotesque hybrid.

spacing_system.component_padding: Most components (buttons, cards, header) appear to use 12–24px padding on the x-axis and 8–16px on the y-axis, aligning with multiples of the 8px base unit. The hero section uses larger vertical padding, around 64–96px top and bottom.
spacing_system.section_margin: Vertical spacing between major sections is likely 48–80px, with content within sections separated by 16–32px gaps.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely change color from gray to black or red on hover, possibly with an underline or subtle bottom border animation.
The red CTA button probably darkens slightly or adds a soft shadow on hover, with a smooth 150–250ms transition on background-color and box-shadow.
The duration card may scale up slightly or increase border thickness on hover, or invert colors (white fill with black text) for emphasis.
The floating chat/help button almost certainly uses a hover scale or glow effect, and may open a modal or chat panel on click with a slide or fade-in animation.
Section transitions on scroll might include simple fade-in or slide-up animations for hero text and cards, aligned with the minimal, corporate tone (no overly playful motion).
